projects.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" fill="none" stroke="#2A8FC0" stroke-width="7" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M34 20 L34 74"/><path d="M34 20 C64 20 64 74 34 74"/><path d="M18 88 Q28 82 38 88 Q48 94 58 88 Q68 82 78 88"/></svg>
projects.name: Dubai Madeira Cooperative — housing cooperative
projects.hook: A cooperative under Portuguese law for collective property purchase. The first asset gained +48% in 15 months.
projects.description: A housing and construction cooperative (Cooperativa de Habitação e Construção) for collective property purchase in the «Dubai» Madeira development — a premium 400-apartment project in Funchal, Madeira. A non-profit with tax benefits — exemption from IRC, IMT, IMI. Next project — SeedWave_11, entry from 5,000 EUR.
projects.investment: 150,000 EUR (20% of asset value). Minimum entry from 5,000 EUR.

how: The cooperative is established under Portuguese law (Cooperativa de Habitação e Construção) — a non-profit form with tax benefits: exemption from IRC, IMT and IMI.
Members contribute shares from 5,000 EUR and jointly raise 150,000 EUR — 20% of the asset value; the rest is covered by bank financing.
The cooperative purchases the property; ownership is transparently assigned to the members, all decisions follow the statutes.
Income comes from asset appreciation and rent. Exit — sale of your share or of the property under rules agreed in advance.
proofs: The first asset gained +48% in value over 15 months.
Cooperative tax benefits: exemption from IRC, IMT and IMI.
Next project — SeedWave_11, entry from 5,000 EUR.
Initiated by Igor Kartuzov — 35 years in real assets, living and working in Madeira.

projects.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" fill="none" stroke="#12D68A" stroke-width="7" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" role="img" aria-label="nEm"><title>nEm — Nova Energia da Madeira</title><path d="M22 20 L22 62"/><path d="M22 20 Q31 14 40 20 Q49 26 58 20"/><path d="M22 41 Q30 35 38 41 Q46 47 54 41"/><path d="M22 62 Q31 56 40 62 Q49 68 58 62"/><path d="M15 86 Q28 80 39 86 Q50 92 61 86 Q72 80 85 86"/></svg>
projects.name: nEm — Nova Energia da Madeira
projects.hook: Solar, batteries and charging with a subsidy and state support — turnkey.
projects.description: Nova Energia da Madeira: clean, green energy for Madeira homes and condominiums — panels, battery and charging with state support, turnkey. One window: design, documents, subsidy application management (+ENERGIA, Fundo Ambiental) and a certified installer recommendation. The project does not install, is not a financial intermediary and does not hold residents' money. Energy efficiency is the foundation and first step of the ILYNQ horizon — a decentralized AI on the island.

how: The roof, consumption and payback are assessed — the package's benefit is calculated.
Documents are prepared and the condominium approval is handled: assembly minutes, datasheets, registration.
The subsidy application is filed in the right window — +ENERGIA (panels + battery) and Fundo Ambiental / e-mobility (charging).
One energy loop is installed turnkey: sun by day → battery → charging in the evening and a lower shared bill.
A certified installer is selected and the project is carried through to the subsidy payout. From you — one word: “I want it”.
proofs: First pilot — the VARINO coalition (Dubai Madeira, Funchal): block 8 handed over in August 2026, block 9 prepared energy-ready during construction. Pilot in progress, not completed.
Alignment with AREAM — the regional energy and environment agency — as a mission partner (in line with PAESC-RAM goals).
Programmes: +ENERGIA up to €10,000 per condominium (75% generation, 85% storage); Fundo Ambiental — T7 charging up to 80%.
Legal basis: DL 93/2025 requires new buildings to have charging infrastructure — the project ensures this and goes solar-ready during construction.
vision: Every closed project is an Opportunity card and proof of method, not a slide.
From facilitator to node: energy communities and deal flow into construction — as the phases progress.
The ILYNQ horizon: the island's cheap clean energy as the foundation of a distributed AI. Building toward it, not claiming it works.

projects.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" fill="none" stroke="#E2622E" stroke-width="7" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M36 16 V84"/><path d="M36 21 Q49 9 60 20 Q70 28 82 19"/><path d="M36 50 H70"/></svg>
projects.name: Forge — from idea to a live product
projects.hook: Tell us your idea — AI builds a working product from it. Not a pitch deck, a live MVP you open on your phone.
projects.description: The SeedWave constructor: a proven path from a raw idea to a live product. AI structures any idea for free; the strong ones we build together. Already proven with Treino, Birdie, Relic. The method is open — bring an idea, don't look for someone to trust it with.

how: Tell your idea in a sentence — to the Telegram bot or right on the showcase.
AI review structures it: who it's for, what already exists, the core, what to look for.
Strong ideas we build into a working MVP — multilingual engine, bot, checkout.
The product goes live: a link, first users, a card in SeedWave.
The method is open: same path every time; a new product is content, not a rebuild.
proofs: Treino: idea “learn a language from your own story” → a live app with paying students.
Birdie: idea “an assistant for golf learners” → a multilingual PWA assistant in pilot.
Relic: idea “value an old coin” → an AI bot built in half a day.
vision: A stream of participant ideas fills SeedWave: every structured idea becomes a card in the registry.
Strong ideas turn into live products and feed the platform's deal flow.
The constructor is a training ground: each built product sharpens the repeatable method.

projects.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" fill="none" stroke="#4C8DFF" stroke-width="7" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" role="img" aria-label="nAm"><title>nAm — Novos Apoios da Madeira</title><path d="M30 72 L50 16 L70 72"/><path d="M37 52 Q43.5 46 50 52 Q56.5 58 63 52"/><path d="M15 88 Q28 82 39 88 Q50 94 61 88 Q72 82 85 88"/></svg>
projects.name: nAm — Novos Apoios da Madeira
projects.hook: How much does the State owe your business? 6 questions — and your number in euros.
projects.description: Madeira grants checker: 6 quick questions and you see the support programmes and amounts your business may qualify for — hiring, cost compensation, energy, starting up. Then one word — «I want it»: documents, application in the right window, follow-through to payout. Sister of nEm under the ILYNQ umbrella: a grants client is a warm lead for the energy package.
projects.lookingFor: Madeira restaurants & small businesses · Partner contabilistas

projects.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" fill="none" stroke="#E8833C" stroke-width="7" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M35 18 L35 66 L60 66"/><path d="M14 84 Q26 78 38 84 Q50 90 62 84 Q74 78 86 84"/></svg>
projects.name: Lis — lives your routine for you
projects.hook: A personal AI secretary on top of Cowork and Claude. Connect email, calendar, bank and notes once — then it sorts the flow itself. From you: just ‘Yes’ or ‘No’.
projects.description: Not an inbox bot you have to feed, but a layer on top of your Claude: your sources fill Lis themselves, it understands every item, handles the reversible silently, and brings you only the result and a Yes/No fork. Want to remember something — just drop a photo, it does the rest.

projects.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" fill="none" stroke="#29B5CF" stroke-width="7" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" role="img" aria-label="nTm"><title>nTm — Novos Trilhos da Madeira</title><path d="M28 22 H72"/><path d="M50 22 V68"/><path d="M15 84 Q28 78 39 84 Q50 90 61 84 Q72 78 85 84"/></svg>
projects.name: nTm — Novos Trilhos da Madeira
projects.hook: Open today? Status of all 14 trails, live weather at the trailhead and SIMplifica booking in one tap.
projects.description: Since 1 January 2026 every classified walking trail on Madeira requires a booked 30-minute slot on the SIMplifica portal — and trails close without warning after landslides or bad weather. nTm answers one question before a visitor drives into the mountains: is it open today? It shows the status of 14 trails (official IFCN source), live weather at each trailhead computed from its real altitude — the contrast «Funchal +26°, on the ridge +9° with 62 km/h wind» — and links straight to the official booking portal. If a trail is closed, it suggests the nearest open trail of the same kind. We are not a payment operator or a travel agency: the booking button is a link to SIMplifica. Every week, a «secret from a local» — a place the tour buses don't know. Top of the SeedWave funnel: traffic and trust, the first step towards the Guide and towards housing in Funchal.
projects.lookingFor: Operators with IFCN protocol · Local accommodation · Guides · Content partners

how: Open nTm — all 14 trails with current status: open, partial, closed. Timestamp and a link to the official IFCN source.
See live weather at each trailhead, computed from the real altitude of the starting point (Open-Meteo), not from the city.
Pick your trail. If it's closed, we show the nearest open trail of the same kind — coast instead of mountain.
Book your 30-minute slot on the official SIMplifica portal: €4.50 per trail, PR1 €10.50, residents and children ≤12 free (booking still required).
Each week, a secret from a local — and for those who keep coming back, the path to living here, not just visiting.
proofs: Five years living and walking on Madeira: the trails, the right hours, the weather that changes at 1,800 m.
Verified legal basis: Portaria 801/2025 (10.12) and Portaria 48/2026 (13.02); trail status from IFCN, IP-RAM.
Live weather via the public Open-Meteo API, by coordinates and altitude of each trailhead — no key, no cost, no server.
SeedWave three-layer architecture: engine, five languages, data. A new trail or a new language never touches the engine.
page.vision: A step on the ILYNQ ladder. nTm is the top of the funnel: the visitor returns every day because the question «open today?» keeps coming back. Utility builds trust; trust opens the Guide to secret places; and for those who fall for the island, the next step — an apartment in Funchal, cooperatively. Phase 2: webcams, GPX, «the trail has reopened» alerts.

projects.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" fill="none" stroke="#C88A2E" stroke-width="7" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" role="img" aria-label="nCm"><title>nCm — Nova Colheita da Madeira</title><path d="M69 29 A27 27 0 1 0 69 71"/><path d="M15 86 Q28 80 39 86 Q50 92 61 86 Q72 80 85 86"/></svg>
projects.name: nCm — Nova Colheita da Madeira
projects.hook: Farm 2.0 for a fraction of the price: Madeira's programmes pay up to 85% of your farm's modernization — turnkey.
projects.description: Nova Colheita da Madeira teaches farmers the technologies of the future — drip irrigation, sensors, smart greenhouse, cold storage, solar, drone — and the key point: Madeira's programmes (F.1 PEPAC) pay up to 85% of that modernization. The Farm 2.0 builder turns the plan into three numbers: cost, what the programme pays, your share. Then one window: paperwork, IFAP registration, application in the right window, follow-through to payout. Direct payments (POSEI, Single Application, ANC, organic) as the farm's regular income. The project neither grants subsidies nor holds the farmer's money. A rung on the ILYNQ ladder: solar on the greenhouse links to nEm, processing to nAm. Technology first — the subsidy is the fuel for growth.
projects.lookingFor: Pilot farms · Cooperatives · Agritech suppliers · SRA partner

how: Build your farm 2.0 in the constructor: irrigation, sensors, greenhouse, cold storage, solar, drone — and instantly see three numbers: cost, what the programme pays, your share.
Answer 7 questions — we confirm the programmes and your rate: base 65%, young farmer up to 85%.
Your plan for the future is ready: technologies with amounts + the farm's regular payments (POSEI, Single Application, ANC, organic) — honest count, tier A/B.
We prepare documents and IFAP registration, apply in the right window: direct — annual; F.1 investment and young-farmer premium — by aviso.
We follow through to payout. From you — just one word: «I want in».
proofs: 26 years of full-cycle agribusiness (Kartofel / Freshland): production, cold storage, sales — farm 2.0 built by hand before it was a trend.
Real Madeira instruments: F.1 investment up to 85% (Portaria 583/2025 — young-farmer premium F.1.2), POSEI, Single Application, ANC, agri-environment.
Channels worked: SRA Madeira, IFAP, AREAM, cooperatives — entry via feiras and the Regional Directorate of Agriculture.
Honest count (tier A/B): direct and formula payments in the headline; competitive investment measures on a separate track, no inflated promises.
vision: Every modernized farm is an Opportunity record and proof of method, not a slide.
The ILYNQ ladder in action: solar on the greenhouse → nEm, processing and marketing → nAm; the client grows rung by rung.
ILYNQ horizon: tech-driven agriculture + the island's surplus clean energy as the foundation of distributed AI. We prepare it, we don't claim it as already operational.

projects.name: Treino — learn a language through your own story
projects.hook: Study a language on your own real phrases: swipe cards, spaced repetition, audio. 6 language pairs already, checkout is live.
projects.description: A learning engine: your personal phrases → swipe cards (Leitner) with text-to-speech and a listening mode. One engine — new languages are added as dictionaries, already 6 live pairs. Monetised via Gumroad (Merchant of Record, EU VAT handled). Go-to-market: warm circle + QR flyers.

how: Take your own real phrases — from life, work, lessons with your teacher.
The engine turns them into swipe cards with text-to-speech and a listening mode.
Spaced repetition (Leitner method) brings a phrase back exactly when your brain is about to forget it.
A new language is a new dictionary, not a new app: one engine, a language switcher.
proofs: 6 live language pairs: RU→PT, EN→PT, PT→RU, ES→PT, RU→DE, DE→PT.
Checkout is live: Gumroad, EU VAT handled automatically (Merchant of Record).
An open methodology is published: the method, the science, 14 sources.

projects.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" fill="none" stroke="#E14B6A" stroke-width="7" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M72 36 A26 26 0 1 0 72 64 L72 50 L54 50"/><path d="M20 84 Q30 78 40 84 Q50 90 60 84 Q70 78 80 84"/></svg>
projects.name: My Guide — a personal guide from your map pins
projects.hook: Your saved places become a beautiful guide you share with one link. Scenarios for the situation, secret spots, live sunset times.
projects.description: A personal-guide engine: your saved pins → a visual guide with scenarios ("half-day · car · sunset"), an auto secret-spot flag and live sunset times. One engine — a new guide is just a new set of pins. Free, the funnel leads into SeedWave.

how: Save places on Google Maps — as usual, with your own notes.
The engine turns them into a visual guide: map, cards, ratings, your notes.
Pins assemble into scenarios: "half-day · car · sunset" — a guide for the guest's situation.
Secret spots are flagged automatically; the popular ones move to "the base nearby".
A new guide is a new set of pins, not a new app: "My Paris", "My Madeira".
proofs: A live guide "My Undiscovered Madeira": 17 spots, 3 hero scenarios, 5 interface languages.
Sunset time is computed live (SunCalc) — no servers, no keys, a clean asset.
Place data is a Google snapshot (rating, hours, photo); the moat is the author's personal note.
vision: The user builds their own guide — and can give it as a personal gift.
Cowork assembles a new author's guide from their pins — the Forge loop in action.
Hundreds of personal guides → a living SeedWave geography and a flow of users.

projects.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" fill="none" stroke="#6C8CB4" stroke-width="7" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M72 36 A26 26 0 1 0 72 64 L72 50 L54 50"/><path d="M20 84 Q30 78 40 84 Q50 90 60 84 Q70 78 80 84"/></svg>
projects.name: Guide «My Paris for a Couple of Days»
projects.hook: Gourmet quarters, covered passages and tower views off the tourist trail — from someone who walks these streets.
projects.description: A personal Paris guide on the «My Guide» engine: authored spots across 7 quarters, scenario routes for the situation («half a day · car · sunset»), secret places and live sunset time. Free, the funnel leads into SeedWave.

how: Open the guide — 7 Paris quarters: Tower, Saint-Germain, Latin Quarter, Louvre, Opera, Le Marais, Montmartre.
Spots come with the author's notes: the framing, when to come, what to try; secret places are flagged.
Scenarios are built from the spots: «half a day · car · sunset» — a route for your day.
Each route has three links: Google Maps, show on map, share. Live sunset time is computed on the spot.
proofs: Authored spots across 7 quarters × 5 languages, scenario routes.
From someone who walks these streets — personal notes, not a guidebook.
The same engine as «My Undiscovered Madeira»: a new guide is a new set of spots.

projects.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" fill="none" stroke="#6C5CE7" stroke-width="7" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" role="img" aria-label="Tonight"><title>Tonight</title><path d="M30 68 L30 24 L62 66 L62 22"/><path d="M20 86 Q30 80 40 86 Q50 92 60 86 Q70 80 80 86"/></svg>
projects.name: Tonight — touring platform for artists & venues
projects.hook: A touring platform for small artists and local venues: a chain of nearby cities, one ticket checkout and shared-cost promotion.
projects.description: Helps small artists and organisers find each other, settle fees safely and sell tickets to micro-events. The platform builds a tour from venues with short travel legs and centralises the tour's ad budget. The initiator is an active events operator in Europe.

how: The platform builds a tour as a chain of venues in nearby cities — short travel legs, lower costs.
Artist and venue find each other and fix the terms inside the platform.
One checkout: ticket sales for micro-events and safe payment of the artist's fee.
The tour's ad budget is pooled and spent centrally — cheaper for everyone.
proofs: Initiated by an active events operator in Europe.
Stage: validating demand with real venues and artists.
Looking for a builder (bot + tickets), an operator and pilot venues.

projects.name: Sport creams — natural cosmetics for athletes
projects.hook: A line of natural creams and balms for athletes: recovery, warm-up, skin protection.
projects.description: Proprietary formulas based on natural ingredients. Muscle recovery, pre-workout warm-up, skin protection.

how: Proprietary formulas based on natural ingredients — no unnecessary chemistry.
Three lines: muscle recovery after training, warm-up before exercise, skin protection.
Launch via a pilot with a sports community, then retail and online sales.
proofs: Stage: an idea with ready formulas.
Looking for an investor to produce the pilot batch.

projects.name: Birdie — multilingual golf-course student assistant
projects.hook: The golf lesson is in Portuguese — Birdie opens it up in the student's own language: terms, shots, the group's questions. v1 on the course, 3 languages (RU/PT/EN).
projects.description: A pocket assistant for golf-course students: terms, shot technique, group Q&A and etiquette — in 3 languages now (Russian, Portuguese, English), offline (PWA). A self-filling base: every lesson feeds the shared Q&A bank, and Birdie gets smarter with every group. The same three-layer engine as Treino — a new language is added as a dictionary, architected for 5. A course instructor verifies technique and terms.
projects.lookingFor: Pilot students · Golf clubs and instructors · Partners (courses, gear)

how: The student opens Birdie right on the course — term, shot, question found in seconds, no internet.
After the lesson 5–7 new terms stick with a personal emotional anchor of the moment — the memory mechanic from Treino.
The student's question and the coach's answer stay in the course base: each new group starts with the experience of all previous ones.
Shot technique and Portuguese terms are verified by the course instructor — marked with a trust flag.
proofs: Filled in 3 languages (RU/PT/EN): 73 terms, 7 shots, ~30 Q&A, etiquette rules.
Architected for 5 languages from the start: every member of a multilingual group opens the app in their own. The lesson is shared — the language is each one's own.
v1 on the course: PWA, works offline, tested live in a lesson.
Self-filling base: every lesson feeds the shared Q&A bank — Birdie gets smarter with every group.
The same three-layer engine as Treino — a new language is a dictionary.
vision: "Lesson trace" (v1.5): a short personal recap after the session — what you worked on and what's next.
Voice narrative (v2): tell how your round went — get a breakdown and language from your own game.
Synergy with Treino: one story after a round — both golf terms and a language lesson.
An honest direction, not promises: we open features as they're tested with real students.

projects.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" fill="none" stroke="#C0894B" stroke-width="7" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M26 14 L26 66"/><path d="M26 14 C52 14 52 41 28 42 L26 42"/><path d="M34 42 Q49 53 58 66"/><path d="M14 84 Q26 78 38 84 Q50 90 62 84 Q74 78 86 84"/></svg>
projects.name: Relic — a treasure hunt through what's sitting untouched
projects.hook: Snap an old coin — AI tells you what it is and whether it's worth attention. Valuable finds go to a real antiques expert. You pay only on the sale.
projects.description: Many people keep a grandparent's collection or a handful of odd coins. Relic helps you tell in a minute whether anything is valuable. AI gives a first attribution from the photo — not a price; a human expert values the valuable finds and helps sell them. Serverless stack: Telegram + Make + OpenAI Vision + Notion.

how: Snap an old coin and send the photo to the Telegram bot.
An AI numismatist gives a first attribution from the photo — era, metal, what to look at. Not a price.
Looks valuable? One tap sends the find to a real antiques expert.
The expert values it and helps sell at a real price. Commission only on the sale.
proofs: Live bot @RelicFindBot works on real photos: a Vision read comes back in chat.
AI never invents a price — an honest traffic-light verdict; the exact figure comes from a human, based on auction comparables.
Pay only on results: commission from the sale, no subscriptions or upfront fees.
Serverless, no-code stack: Telegram + Make + OpenAI Vision + Notion.
vision: Beyond coins: tableware, paintings, jewellery — the architecture is already in place.
Provenance capture (the object's story) — raises value and turns a valuation into a family story.
A bot-factory template: 'snap an item → AI Vision → expert' for new categories.
